product: Power BI connections will transition to ADBC
tagline: Power BI plans to transition all Power BI connections to Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) in August 2026.
what_it_does: Power BI plans to transition all Power BI connections to Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) in August 2026. To avoid disruptions, Databricks recommends switching your development and staging semantic models to ADBC now and validating your workloads. The ADBC driver for Power BI on Databricks has been in Public Preview since October 2025.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Power BI plans to transition all Power BI connections to Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) in August 2026. To avoid disruptions, Databricks recommends switching your development and staging semantic models to ADBC now and validating your workloads.
key_takeaway: Power BI plans to transition all Power BI connections to Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) in August 2026.
